rules.name: X2_Countries_Match
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND ((2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5))) OR (5 AND 6 AND 7)
rules.label: 2 Countries Match

decisions.description: MIS-4622 Compare calculated company size levels (1-8)
decisions.name: Rule_CSL_Company_Size_Logic
decisions.label: *Rule (CSL)* - Company Size Logic

rules.name: X2_Company_Size_Match
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (1 AND 2 AND 5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10) OR (NOT(2) AND 11 AND 12) OR (NOT(2) AND NOT(11) AND 13) OR (11 AND 13 AND 14)
rules.label: 2 Company Size Match

decisions.name: Rule_FWCWC_Found_Website_Category_by_Website_Category
decisions.label: *Rule (FWCWC)* - Found Website Category by Website Category?

decisions.name: Rule_IL_Industry_Logic_Which_Industries_are_Populated
decisions.label: *Rule (IL)* - Industry Logic / Which Industries are Populated?

rules.name: X2_Domains_Match
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND ((2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5))) OR (5 AND 6 AND 7)
rules.label: 2 Domains Match

formulas.name: Clean_Parent_Company_Domain
formulas.expression:
If(BEGINS({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, "www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 5, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 4)) != 0, MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 5, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 5, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 4)) -1), MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 5, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 4)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, "http://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 12, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 11)) != 0,MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 12, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},12,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 11)) -1), MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},12,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ})-11)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, "https://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 13, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 12)) != 0,MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 13, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},13,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 12)) -1), MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},13,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ})-12)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, "http://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 8, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 7)) != 0,MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 8, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},8,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 7)) -1), MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},8,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ})-7)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, "https://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 9, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 8)) != 0,MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 9, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},9,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 8)) -1), MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},9,LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ})-8)),
IF(FIND('/',MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, 1, LEN({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}))) !=0,MID({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ},1,FIND('/', {!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}) - 1), {!SI_Parent_Company_HQ} ))))))

formulas.name: Clean_SI_Parent_Company_HQ
formulas.expression: IF({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}="Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Argentina", "Argentina", TRIM( RIGHT( SUBSTITUTE( {!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, LEFT({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, FIND(",", {!SI_Parent_Company_HQ})), "" ), LEN( SUBSTITUTE( {!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, LEFT({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, FIND(",", {!SI_Parent_Company_HQ})), "" ) ) - FIND(",", SUBSTITUTE({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, LEFT({!SI_Parent_Company_HQ}, FIND(",", {!SI_Parent_Company_HQ})), "")) ) ))

formulas.name: Clearbit_Clean_Domain
formulas.expression:
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, "www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 4)) != 0, MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 5, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 4)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 4)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, "http://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 11)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 12, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},12,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 11)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},12,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c})-11)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, "https://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 12)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 13, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},13,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 12)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},13,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c})-12)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, "http://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 7)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 8, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},8,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 7)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},8,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c})-7)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, "https://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 8)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 9, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},9,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 8)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},9,LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c})-8)),
IF(FIND('/',MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}, 1, LEN({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}))) !=0,MID({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c},1,FIND('/', {!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) - 1), {!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c} ))))))

formulas.name: Clearbit_Employee_Number_Level
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c}),-1, IF(AND(VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=1,VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})<=10) ,1 , IF(AND(VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=11,VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})<=50) ,2 , IF (AND(VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=51,VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})<=250) ,3 , IF (AND(VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=251,VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})<=1000) ,4 , IF (AND(VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=1001,VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})<=5000) ,5 , IF (AND(VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=5001,VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})<=10000) ,6 , IF (AND(VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=10001,VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})<=50000) ,7 , IF (VALUE({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c})>=50000 ,8 ,0)))))))))

formulas.name: SFDC_Clean_Domain
formulas.expression:
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4)) != 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "http://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website},12,LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website},12,LEN({!$Record.Website})-11)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "https://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website},13,LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website},13,LEN({!$Record.Website})-12)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "http://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website},8,LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website},8,LEN({!$Record.Website})-7)),
If(BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "https://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8)) != 0,MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website},9,LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8)) -1), MID({!$Record.Website},9,LEN({!$Record.Website})-8)),
IF(FIND('/',MID({!$Record.Website}, 1, LEN({!$Record.Website}))) !=0,MID({!$Record.Website},1,FIND('/', {!$Record.Website}) - 1), {!$Record.Website} ))))))

formulas.name: SI_Clean_Domain
formulas.expression:
If(BEGINS({!SI_Website_Domain}, "www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 5, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 4)) != 0, MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 5, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 5, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 4)) -1), MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 5, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 4)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Website_Domain}, "http://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 12, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 11)) != 0,MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 12, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain},12,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 11)) -1), MID({!SI_Website_Domain},12,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain})-11)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Website_Domain}, "https://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 13, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 12)) != 0,MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 13, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain},13,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 12)) -1), MID({!SI_Website_Domain},13,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain})-12)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Website_Domain}, "http://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 8, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 7)) != 0,MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 8, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain},8,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 7)) -1), MID({!SI_Website_Domain},8,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain})-7)),
If(BEGINS({!SI_Website_Domain}, "https://"), IF(FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 9, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 8)) != 0,MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 9, FIND('/', MID({!SI_Website_Domain},9,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}) - 8)) -1), MID({!SI_Website_Domain},9,LEN({!SI_Website_Domain})-8)),
IF(FIND('/',MID({!SI_Website_Domain}, 1, LEN({!SI_Website_Domain}))) !=0,MID({!SI_Website_Domain},1,FIND('/', {!SI_Website_Domain}) - 1), {!SI_Website_Domain} ))))))

formulas.name: SI_Employee_Number_Level
formulas.expression: IF(AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=-1,{!SI_Employee_Max}=-1) ,-1 , IF(OR(AND(NOT(CONTAINS({!SI_Number_of_Employees},">")) ,{!SI_Employee_Min}=-1),{!SI_Employee_Max}=-1),0, IF(AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=0,{!SI_Employee_Max}=10) ,1 , IF(AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=10,{!SI_Employee_Max}=50) ,2 , IF (AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=50,{!SI_Employee_Max}=200) ,3 , IF (AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=200,{!SI_Employee_Max}=500) ,4 , IF (AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=500,{!SI_Employee_Max}=1000) ,5 , IF (AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=1000,{!SI_Employee_Max}=5000) ,6 , IF (AND({!SI_Employee_Min}=5000,{!SI_Employee_Max}=10000) ,7 , IF ({!SI_Employee_Max}=10000, 8 , 0 ))))))))))

Flow.interviewLabel: Lead Confidence - Record Triggered - Before Save {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Lead Confidence - Record Triggered - Before Save

start.filterFormula: ISNEW() || ( ISCHANGED({!$Record.sw_connector__swId__c}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.SW_Industry__c}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Employees_Estimated__c}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.Employees_Min__c}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.Employees_Max__c}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.Website_Clearbit__c}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.Website}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.Polygraph_Company_Country_Name__c}) || ISCHANGED({!$Record.Country}) )
